description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched roof with deep overhangs and a prominent front porch supported by stone columns. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal siding, with stonework accenting the lower level and porch supports. The front facade includes a wide staircase leading up to the porch, and three large garage doors are visible beneath the porch area. Windows are rectangular and arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front, with fewer and smaller windows on the sides and rear. The roof is a dark, single-plane gable with a slight extension on one side, and the structure sits on a raised foundation. The overall design is simple yet substantial, with a focus on horizontal lines and sturdy materials.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, stone porch columns, and a raised front porch above three garage doors. The exterior features horizontal siding and a symmetrical window arrangement on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide staircase, stone porch columns, three garage doors, and symmetrical front windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the deep roof overhang, minimal windows, and the solid stone and siding construction.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single door, a small staircase, and fewer windows, emphasizing the horizontal siding and raised foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch's side, stone columns, and the continuation of the roof overhang.
